query:
INSERT INTO alert_escalation_rules (name, description, from_severity, to_severity, hours_until_escalation, notify_on_escalation)
VALUES 
  ('Warning to Critical (24h)', 'Escalate unacknowledged warnings to critical after 24 hours', 'warning', 'critical', 24, TRUE),
  ('Info to Warning (48h)', 'Escalate unacknowledged info alerts to warning after 48 hours', 'info', 'warning', 48, TRUE);

INSERT INTO scheduled_compliance_checks (check_type, cron_expression, is_enabled, config)
VALUES 
  ('daily_threshold', '0 8 * * *', TRUE, '{"description": "Daily compliance threshold check at 8 AM"}'),
  ('weekly_digest', '0 9 * * 1', TRUE, '{"description": "Weekly compliance digest every Monday at 9 AM"}'),
  ('escalation_check', '0 */4 * * *', TRUE, '{"description": "Check for alerts needing escalation every 4 hours"}');
